title: HarmonyOS Agent UI Protocol - Extended Catalog
description: Complete catalog for HarmonyOS Agent UI Protocol extensions, including components, interactions, and expressions.

ExtendedComponentCommon.description: Common properties for all extended components

id.description: Unique component identifier within the surface

styles.description: Style properties for the component. Common styles plus component-specific styles.

onClick.description: Array of EventHandlers to execute sequentially on click

onAppear.description: Array of EventHandlers to execute sequentially when component appears

accessibility.description: Accessibility attributes for assistive technologies like screen readers.

label.description: A short string (1-3 words) used by assistive technologies to convey the element's purpose. E.g. 'Submit', 'User ID'.

description.description: Additional information for assistive technologies, such as instructions or format requirements. E.g. 'Silences notifications about this conversation'.

EventHandler.description: A wrapper around a function call in an event handler chain. The function return type is defined by the referenced extended function, not by EventHandler itself.

call.description: Function name referenced by this EventHandler. Predefined and custom functions are defined via catalog extendedFunctions.

as.description: Named variable binding for EventHandler return value. Must start with a letter or underscore, containing only letters, digits, and underscores.

args.description: Arguments passed to the function referenced by call. The argument schema is defined by the referenced extended function.

FunctionCall.description: A call object used where an extended function is invoked. Return type is defined by the referenced extended function.

args.description: Arguments passed to the referenced function

ExtendedFunctionDefinition.description: Definition of a HarmonyOS extended function. Calls reference this definition by name through FunctionCall or EventHandler.call.

returnType.description: Function return type. Void functions may declare const void or omit this field.

interactionOnly.description: Whether the function can only be used in interaction contexts

Expression.description: Expression string wrapped in {{...}}. See expression_grammar.ebnf for complete syntax.

PathBinding.description: A2UI native data binding via JSON Pointer path. The resolved value type depends on the DataModel path target. Distinct from Expression syntax; use for simple declarative data binding.

path.description: JSON Pointer path to the data model value (e.g. '/user/name')

ExtendedDynamicValueRef.description: Dynamic value reference resolved at runtime: expression string, data path binding, or function call.

ExtendedDynamicString.description: String value or dynamic value source resolved at runtime.

ExtendedDynamicNumber.description: Number value or dynamic value source resolved at runtime.

ExtendedDynamicBoolean.description: Boolean value or dynamic value source resolved at runtime.

TemplateChildren.description: Template child generation: iterates over data array at path, instantiating componentId for each item. Default loop variables are $index and $item, customizable via indexVar/itemVar.

componentId.description: Template component ID to instantiate for each array item

path.description: JSON Pointer path to the data array in DataModel

indexVar.description: Custom index variable name (use with $ prefix). Default: 'index'. Must start with a letter or underscore, containing only letters, digits, and underscores.

itemVar.description: Custom item data variable name (use with $ prefix). Default: 'item'. Must start with a letter or underscore, containing only letters, digits, and underscores.

CommonStyles.description: Common styles applicable to all extended components

backgroundImageSizeWithStyle.description: Background image sizing. String enum: 'cover' (fill bounds, maintain ratio), 'contain' (fit inside bounds), 'auto' (original ratio), 'fill' (stretch to fill). Default: 'auto'. Or object {width, height} with number or string values (units: fp, vp, %).

flexShrink.description: Flex shrink ratio when parent container space is insufficient. Higher values shrink more. Default: 1. Range: [0, 1].

width.description: Component width. Number (unit: vp), string with unit (e.g. '100fp', '50%'), or enum: 'matchParent' (fill parent content area), 'wrapContent' (fit content, constrained by parent), 'fixAtIdealSize' (fit content, unconstrained).

height.description: Component height. Number (unit: vp), string with unit (e.g. '100fp', '50%'), or enum: 'matchParent' (fill parent content area), 'wrapContent' (fit content, constrained by parent), 'fixAtIdealSize' (fit content, unconstrained).

constraintSize.description: Size constraints limiting component dimensions during layout. Object {minWidth, maxWidth, minHeight, maxHeight}. All four required. Values: number (vp) or string with unit.

margin.description: Outer spacing around the component. Number for uniform spacing (unit: vp), or object {top, right, bottom, left} for per-side control. Values: number (vp) or string with unit.

borderRadius.description: Border corner radius. Number for uniform radius (unit: vp), or object {topLeft, topRight, bottomLeft, bottomRight} for per-corner control. Values: number (vp) or string with unit.

visibility.description: Component visibility. Default: 'visible'. 'visible': shown normally. 'hidden': invisible but occupies layout space. 'none': invisible and occupies no space.

clip.description: Whether to clip child content to the component's boundary. Default: false.

backgroundColor.description: Background color in 0xARGB hex format (e.g. '#00FF0000'). Default: transparent.

borderWidth.description: Border width. Number (unit: vp) or string with unit (e.g. '2vp').

borderColor.description: Border color in 0xARGB hex format. Default: Color.Black.

padding.description: Inner spacing between component edge and content. Number for uniform spacing (unit: vp), or object {top, right, bottom, left} for per-side control. Values: number (vp) or string with unit.

layoutWeight.description: Layout weight for proportional sizing within parent Row/Column. Default: 1. Only effective when parent is Row or Column.

shadow.description: Shadow effect. Object {offsetX, offsetY, radius, color, fill, type}. radius is required, range [0, +inf). Default offsetX/offsetY: 0vp. Or string enum: 'outerDefaultXS', 'outerDefaultSM', 'outerDefaultMD', 'outerDefaultLG', 'outerFloatingSM', 'outerFloatingMD'.

linearGradient.description: Linear gradient fill. Object {angle, direction, colors, repeating}. angle: number, default 180. direction: enum (Left/Top/Right/Bottom/LeftTop/LeftBottom/RightTop/RightBottom/None), default None. colors: required, array of [color, position] pairs. repeating: boolean, default false.

colors.description: Array of [ResourceColor, number] pairs for gradient color stops

BreakArgs.description: Arguments for 'break' extended function - breaks out of the current EventHandler chain

SetDataModelArgs.description: Arguments for 'setDataModel' extended function - modifies data model values

path.description: JSON Pointer path to the data model location

value.description: Value to set. Can be a literal value or an expression.

SetAttributesArgs.description: Arguments for 'setAttributes' extended function - modifies component attribute values in batch

componentId.description: Target component ID whose attributes will be modified

value.description: Object with attribute names as keys and attribute values as values. All specified attributes will be set on the target component.

NavigateArgs.description: Arguments for 'navigate' extended function - performs NavContainer sub-page navigation. Use 'componentId' and 'targetComponentId' parameters.

componentId.description: Target NavContainer component ID to operate on

targetComponentId.description: Target sub-page component ID to navigate to

EventContext.description: Context information automatically injected when an event is triggered. Available as $context in expressions within event handlers.

componentId.description: ID of the component that triggered the event

eventData.description: Event-specific data, type varies by event and component

RadioChangeEventData.description: Event data for Radio onChange event

CheckboxChangeEventData.description: Event data for Checkbox onChange event

CheckboxGroupChangeEventData.description: Event data for CheckboxGroup onChange event

status.description: Select all status: All, Part, or None

TabsChangeEventData.description: Event data for Tabs onChange event

index.description: Index of the currently active tab, starting from 0

ToggleChangeEventData.description: Event data for Toggle onChange event

SelectEventData.description: Event data for Select onSelect event

index.description: Index of the selected option, starting from 0

VariableScope.description: Global variables accessible in any expression. Includes DataModel variables (surface-level scope, one instance per surface) and system variables (truly global).

__dataModel.description: Data model object containing all application data for the current surface. Surface-level scope (not shared across surfaces). Access using dot notation: $__dataModel.path.to.property

LocalVariableScope.description: Local variables available in specific contexts

index.description: Current iteration index (starts from 0). Available in parent components that use template to generate child components (Row, Column, List, Grid, Tabs).

item.description: Current iteration item data. Type is 'any' (can be a primitive or object). Available in parent components that use template to generate child components.

as-binding.description: Named variable binding for EventHandler return values. EventHandler with 'as' field (e.g., 'as': 'validResult') creates a local variable accessible as $validResult in subsequent EventHandlers within the same event. Scoped to the current event's handler chain, released when all handlers complete.

context.description: Event context information automatically injected when event is triggered. Access via $context.componentId and $context.eventData.

ExpressionOperator.description: Operators supported in expressions, listed by precedence (highest to lowest). See expression_grammar.ebnf for complete syntax.

string.description: Text strings. Use single quotes for literals: 'hello world'. Use + operator for string concatenation: 'Hello, ' + $name

boolean.description: Boolean values. Must be lowercase: true or false

ExpressionBuiltinFunction.description: Builtin functions available only inside expressions {{ }}. Distinct from extendedFunctions which are EventHandler chain calls. Currently only size() is supported.

size.description: Returns the length of an array. Parameter type: array. Returns 0 when the argument is not an array.

ExpressionTypeCoercion.description: Automatic type coercion rules for expression operators. Type coercion failure returns empty string "".

falsyDefinition.description: Falsy values: false, 0, '' (empty string). All other values are truthy.

addition.description: Addition operator + rules. If either operand is string, concatenate (convert the other to string); otherwise, arithmetic addition (boolean converts to number).

default.rule: boolean to number (true=1, false=0), arithmetic addition
boolean to number (true=1, false=0), arithmetic addition

arithmetic.description: Arithmetic operators - * / % rules. All operands convert to number. Boolean converts directly, string attempts conversion, failure returns "".

default.rule: Both attempt number conversion, either failure returns ""

comparison.description: Comparison operators > >= < <= rules. Same type string: dictionary order; otherwise: convert to number, string conversion failure returns "".

equality.description: Equality operators == != rules. Same type: direct comparison; different types: boolean to number or string, string attempts number conversion.

default.rule: Conversion failure, returns false (!= returns true)

logical.description: Logical operators && || rules. Short-circuit evaluation, returns actual value (not necessarily boolean).

logicalNotAndTernary.description: Logical NOT ! and ternary conditional ? : rules. Uses falsy definition (false, 0, '').

PathSyntax.description: Path syntax for accessing data in the data model. Three path types: absolute, relative, and JSON Pointer.

absolutePath.description: Absolute path starting from data model root using $__dataModel prefix. Available in any expression.
absolutePath.notes: Must use $__dataModel prefix. Use . for property access. Use [] for array index access only.

relativePath.description: Relative path from current scope using $ prefix. Only available in sub-component templates (Row, Column, List, Grid, Tabs).
relativePath.notes: Uses $ prefix. In sub-component templates, $item refers to current iteration item and $index to current iteration index. Customizable via indexVar/itemVar.

jsonPointer.description: JSON Pointer syntax using ${/path/to/value}. Equivalent to $__dataModel prefix but uses / separator instead of dot notation. Available in any expression.
jsonPointer.notes: Equivalent to absolute path: ${/user/name} ≡ $__dataModel.user.name. Uses / as separator. Distinct from A2UI native 'path' attribute which uses JSON Pointer as literal values without expression support.

arrayAccess.description: Array element access using bracket notation
arrayAccess.notes: Index can be a number constant or a variable. Supports chain access like $items[0].user.name

ExpressionReactivity.description: Reactive expressions automatically re-evaluate when referenced variables change. Only global system variables ($__widthBreakpoint, $__colorMode) and DataModel variables ($__dataModel.xxx) are reactive. Local variables ($item, $index, $context, as-binding) are NOT reactive.

behavior.description: When a reactive variable used in an expression changes, the expression automatically re-evaluates and updates the associated property or style

updateScope.description: Reactive updates apply to component properties (content, text, condition, visible, etc.) and component style properties (fontSize, fontColor, width, etc.)

evaluationFailure.description: When expression evaluation fails, returns empty string "" without interrupting rendering

reservedCharacter.description: # character is reserved for future use to disable reactivity on specific expressions

examples.description: Responsive font size based on window breakpoint
Dynamic style based on data model
Conditional visibility based on array emptiness

Action.description: Button action for form submission or function call. Takes priority over event listeners (onClick).

content.description: Text content to display. Supports expression binding for dynamic content.

textOverflow.description: Text overflow behavior when content exceeds maxLines. Default: 'clip'. 'none': truncate at max lines. 'clip': same as none. 'ellipsis': show ellipsis for overflow. 'marquee': scroll text in single line. Must be used with maxLines.

decoration.description: Text decoration line style. Object {type, color, style, thicknessScale}. Default: {type:'none', color:'black', style:'solid', thicknessScale:1.0}. type: none/underline/overline/lineThrough. style: solid/double/dotted/dashed/wavy.

fontWeight.description: Font weight. Default: 400. Range: [100, 900] in steps of 100.

textAlign.description: Horizontal text alignment. Default: 'start'. Options: start (align leading), center, end (align trailing), justify (both edges).

maxLines.description: Maximum number of text lines. Default: inf (no limit when unset or invalid). Range: [0, inf]. Use with textOverflow for overflow behavior.

wordBreak.description: Word break rule. Default: 'breakWord'. 'normal': CJK breaks anywhere, non-CJK at whitespace. 'breakAll': break anywhere. 'breakWord': prefer word boundaries, fallback to anywhere. 'hyphenation': try hyphen at line end.

maxFontSize.description: Maximum adaptive font size in fp. Must be used with minFontSize and maxLines or layout constraints. No effect when maxFontSize <= 0 or maxFontSize < minFontSize.

minFontSize.description: Minimum adaptive font size in fp. Must be used with maxFontSize and maxLines or layout constraints. No effect when minFontSize <= 0.

fontScaleMode.description: Font scaling mode. Default: 'followSystem'. 'followSystem': use system setting. 'custom': use custom minFontScale/maxFontScale.

minFontScale.description: Minimum font scale ratio. Default: follow system. Range: [0, 1]. Values < 0 treated as 0, > 1 treated as 1.

maxFontScale.description: Maximum font scale ratio. Default: follow system. Range: [1, inf). Values < 1 treated as 1.

allOf.description: Display component for rendering text content. Supports font styling, color, text overflow, word break, and adaptive font sizing.

label.description: Text label displayed on the button. Supports expression binding.

enabled.description: Whether the button is interactive. Default: true. Disabled buttons are visually distinct and non-clickable.

action.description: Button action for form submission or function call. Priority: action > event listeners (onClick). Only Button supports this property. Two formats: {event:{name, context?}} for server submission, or {functionCall:{call, args?}} for local function invocation.

fontColor.description: Button text color in hex format.

fontWeight.description: Font weight. Default: 500. Number [100-900] in steps of 100, or enum: 'lighter'(100), 'normal'(400), 'regular'(400), 'medium'(500), 'bold'(700), 'bolder'(900).

maxFontSize.description: Maximum adaptive font size in fp. See Text.maxFontSize for usage rules.

minFontSize.description: Minimum adaptive font size in fp. Must be used with maxFontSize or layout constraints. No effect when minFontSize <= 0.

fontScaleMode.description: Font scaling mode. 'followSystem': use system setting. 'custom': use custom scale values.

maxFontScale.description: Maximum font scale ratio. Range: [1, inf).

allOf.description: Interactive component for user actions. Supports text label, enabled/disabled state, and action-based interaction (form submission or function call). Action takes priority over onClick event.

text.description: Default text content pre-filled in the input field.

placeholder.description: Placeholder hint text shown when the input is empty.

enabled.description: Whether the input field is interactive. Default: true.

maxLength.description: Maximum number of characters allowed in the input.

type.description: Input type controlling keyboard and validation behavior. Default: 'normal'. Options: normal, number, phoneNumber, email, password, numberPassword, userName, newPassword, numberDecimal, url.

onChange.description: Event handlers triggered when the text value changes. Event data: {value: string}.

placeholderColor.description: Placeholder text color in hex format. Default: follows theme.

cancelButton.description: Clear button style on the right side. Object {style, fontColor, fontSize}. style: 'constant' (always show), 'invisible' (always hide), 'input' (show during input). Default style: 'input'.

caretColor.description: Text cursor color in hex format. Default: light mode '#FF0A59F7', dark mode '#5291FF'.

selectedBackgroundColor.description: Selected text highlight color in hex format. Default: 20% opacity.

showUnderline.description: Whether to show underline. Default: false. Only effective when type is 'normal'.

underlineColor.description: Underline colors by state. Object {typing, normal, error, disable}. Each value is a hex color string. All optional.

fontWeight.description: Font weight. Default: 400 (normal). Number [100-900] in steps of 100, or enum: 'lighter'(100), 'normal'(400), 'regular'(400), 'medium'(500), 'bold'(700), 'bolder'(900).

fontColor.description: Text color in hex format. Default: light mode '#99000000', dark mode '#99FFFFFF'.

textAlign.description: Horizontal text alignment. Default: 'start'. Options: start, center, end, justify (treated as start).

maxFontSize.description: Maximum adaptive font size in fp. See Text.maxFontSize for usage rules.

minFontSize.description: Minimum adaptive font size in fp. See Text.minFontSize for usage rules.

wordBreak.description: Word break rule. Default: 'normal'. See Text.wordBreak for options.

maxLines.description: Maximum text lines. Default: 3. Only effective in inline edit mode. Range: (0, inf].

fontScaleMode.description: Font scaling mode. 'followSystem': use system setting. 'custom': use custom scale values.

maxFontScale.description: Maximum font scale ratio. Range: [1, inf).

allOf.description: Text input component for user text entry. Supports multiple input types (normal, number, email, password, etc.), placeholder, max length, and change event monitoring.
Navigation container component that manages multiple sub-pages in a stacked manner, displaying only the page at currentIndex at a time

children.description: Array of child component IDs, each representing a page.

currentIndex.description: Index of the currently displayed sub-page. Default: 0. Supports expression binding.

allOf.description: Container component that switches between content views through tabs. Each tab corresponds to a TabContent child. Supports horizontal/vertical orientation, scrollable mode, and template-based child generation.

barPosition.description: Tab bar position. Default: 'start'. 'start': tabs at top (horizontal) or left (vertical). 'end': tabs at bottom (horizontal) or right (vertical).

children.description: Child component ID list or template component ID and loop data path. Child component type must be TabContent.

vertical.description: Whether tabs are arranged vertically. Default: false (horizontal).

scrollable.description: Whether page switching can be done by swiping. Default: true.

tabIndex.description: Index of the currently displayed tab. Default: 0.

onChange.description: Event handlers triggered when active tab changes. Event data: {index: number}.

allOf.description: Content container used only in Tabs component, corresponding to the content container of one tab

title.description: Title text displayed on the tab navigation bar.

icon.description: Icon resource displayed on the tab navigation bar.

selectedSrc.description: Icon resource displayed when the tab is selected.

tabType.description: Tab style. 'capsule': capsule-shaped tab. 'underline': underline-shaped tab.

selectedColor.description: Title text color when this tab is selected, in hex format.

unSelectedColor.description: Title text color when this tab is not selected, in hex format.

defaultBackgroundColor.description: Tab background color when not selected, in hex format.

selectedBackgroundColor.description: Tab background color when selected, in hex format.

defaultBorderColor.description: Tab border color when not selected, in hex format.

selectedBorderColor.description: Tab border color when selected, in hex format.

fontSize.description: Tab title font size in fp. Default: 16.

fontWeight.description: Tab title font weight. Default: 500. Number [100-900] in steps of 100, or enum: 'lighter'(100), 'normal'(400), 'regular'(400), 'medium'(500), 'bold'(700), 'bolder'(900).

iconSize.description: Tab icon size in vp. Default: 16.

space.description: Spacing between tab title and icon in vp. Default: 0.

allOf.description: Content container used only as a direct child of Tabs. Defines one tab's title, icon, and display style (capsule or underline).
Dropdown select menu for selecting among multiple options

options.description: Dropdown menu items. Each item is {value: string, icon?: string, symbolIcon?: object}. value is required.

selected.description: Index of the initially selected option.

value.description: Text displayed on the dropdown button. Auto-updates after selection.

onSelect.description: Event handlers triggered when an option is selected. Event data: {index: number, value: string}.

divider.description: Divider line between dropdown options. Object {strokeWidth, startMargin, endMargin, color}. Default: {strokeWidth:'1px', color:'#33182431'}.

font.description: Dropdown button text style. Object {size, weight, family, style}. size: number in fp. weight: font weight. family: font list comma-separated. style: 'normal' (default) or 'italic'.

fontColor.description: Dropdown button text color in hex format.

selectedOptionBgColor.description: Background color of the selected dropdown option, in hex format.

selectedOptionFont.description: Selected option text style. Object {size, weight, family, style}. Same structure as font.

selectedOptionFontColor.description: Text color of the selected dropdown option, in hex format.

optionBgColor.description: Background color of unselected dropdown options. Default: transparent.

optionFont.description: Unselected option text style. Object {size, weight, family, style}. Same structure as font.

optionFontColor.description: Text color of unselected dropdown options, in hex format.

space.description: Spacing between dropdown button text and arrow icon in vp. Default: 8. Values <= 8 use default.

arrowPosition.description: Arrow icon position relative to text. Default: 'end'. 'start': arrow before text. 'end': text before arrow.

menuAlign.description: Dropdown menu alignment relative to button. Object {alignType, offset}. alignType: 'start' (default)/'center'/'end'. offset: {dx, dy} in vp, default {0, 0}.

optionWidth.description: Dropdown menu item width in vp. Default: 2 grid columns. Values < 56vp use default.

optionHeight.description: Dropdown menu maximum height in vp. Default: 80% of available screen height. Value 0 uses default.

menuBackgroundColor.description: Dropdown menu background color. Default: transparent.

allOf.description: Dropdown select menu for choosing among multiple options. Supports custom fonts, colors, divider styles, menu alignment, and selection event.
Container component for rendering web content via URL.

url.description: URL address of the web page to render.

allOf.description: Horizontal layout component that arranges children in a row

children.description: Child component ID list or template component ID and loop data path.

itemMargin.description: Horizontal spacing between children in vp. Default: 16.

wrap.description: Line wrapping mode. Default: 'noWrap' (single-line, children constrained in container). 'wrap' allows multi-line layout with child wrapping.

justifyContent.description: Horizontal alignment of children along main axis. Default: 'start'. Options: start, center, end, spaceBetween (edges flush, equal gaps), spaceAround (half-gap at edges), spaceEvenly (equal gaps everywhere).

alignItems.description: Vertical alignment of children along cross axis. Default: 'center'. 'top': align to top. 'center': vertically centered. 'bottom': align to bottom.

allOf.description: Horizontal layout component that arranges children in a row. Supports template-based child generation, configurable item spacing (itemMargin), and single/multi-line wrapping (wrap).
Vertical layout component that arranges children in a column

children.description: Child component ID list or template component ID and loop data path.

itemMargin.description: Vertical spacing between children in vp. Default: 8.

justifyContent.description: Vertical alignment of children along main axis. Default: 'start'. Options: start, center, end, spaceBetween (edges flush, equal gaps), spaceAround (half-gap at edges), spaceEvenly (equal gaps everywhere).

alignItems.description: Horizontal alignment of children along cross axis. Default: 'start'. 'start': align to leading edge. 'center': horizontally centered. 'end': align to trailing edge.

allOf.description: Vertical layout component that arranges children in a column. Supports template-based child generation and configurable item spacing (itemMargin).
Scrollable list component for efficiently displaying many items

children.description: Child component ID list or template component ID and loop data path.

space.description: Spacing between list items in vp. Default: 0. Negative values or values >= content area length are treated as default.

onReachStart.description: Event handlers triggered when list scrolls to the start position.

onReachEnd.description: Event handlers triggered when list scrolls to the end position.

listDirection.description: List arrangement direction. Default: 'vertical'. 'vertical': items stacked vertically. 'horizontal': items arranged horizontally.

scrollBar.description: Scroll bar visibility. Default: 'auto'. 'off': never show. 'auto': show on touch, hide after 2s. 'on': always visible.

nestedScroll.description: Nested scroll behavior for parent-child scroll coordination.

allOf.description: Scrollable list component for efficiently displaying many items. Supports template-based child generation, horizontal/vertical direction, scroll bar control, and reach-start/end events.
Stack layout where children are stacked on top of each other

children.description: Array of child component IDs stacked on top of each other.

alignContent.description: Alignment of children within the stack. Default: 'center'. Options: topStart, top, topEnd, start, center, end, bottomStart, bottom, bottomEnd.

allOf.description: Stack layout component where children are layered on top of each other. Supports 9-position alignment.
Grid layout component for arranging children in rows and columns

children.description: Child component ID list or template component ID and loop data path.

columnsTemplate.description: Column layout template using fr units (e.g. '1fr 1fr 2fr'). Each fr represents one column with proportional width. Default: 1 column.

rowsTemplate.description: Row layout template using fr units (e.g. '1fr 1fr 2fr'). Each fr represents one row with proportional height. Default: 1 row.

columnsGap.description: Gap between columns in vp. Default: 0. Range: [0, inf).

rowsGap.description: Gap between rows in vp. Default: 0. Range: [0, inf).

allOf.description: Grid layout component that arranges children in rows and columns using fr-based templates. Supports template-based child generation and configurable row/column gaps.
Image component for displaying local, network, or resource images

src.description: Image source URL or local resource path. Supports expression binding for dynamic image source. SVG format is not supported, including base64-encoded SVG (e.g., data:image/svg+xml;base64,...).

aspectRatio.description: Width-to-height ratio (width/height). Default: 1.0. When only width is set, height = width/ratio. When only height is set, width = height*ratio. When both set with ratio, height is recalculated. constraintSize takes priority over aspectRatio.

objectFit.description: Image fill mode. Default: 'cover'. 'fill': stretch to fill. 'contain': fit inside maintaining ratio. 'cover': fill covering bounds. 'auto': proportional scaling. 'none': original size centered. 'scaleDown': shrink or keep original. Also supports alignment positions: topStart/top/topEnd/start/center/end/bottomStart/bottom/bottomEnd, and 'matrix' for custom positioning.

allOf.description: Image component for displaying local, network, or resource images. Supports aspect ratio and various object-fit modes.
Divider component for visually separating content areas

strokeWidth.description: Divider line width. Default: '1px'. Number (unit: vp) or string with unit. Invalid values use default.

vertical.description: Divider direction. Default: false (horizontal). true for vertical divider.

color.description: Divider color in hex format. Default: light mode #33000000, dark mode #33FFFFFF.

allOf.description: Divider component for visually separating content areas. Supports horizontal/vertical orientation, custom width, and color.
Toggle switch component for binary state (on/off)

label.description: Text label displayed next to the toggle switch.

isOn.description: Whether the toggle is in the on (active) state. Required.

enabled.description: Whether the toggle is interactive. Default: true.

onChange.description: Event handlers triggered when toggle state changes. Event data: {isOn: boolean}.

selectedColor.description: Background color when toggle is ON. Default: light '#330A59F7', dark '#33317AF7'.

unSelectedColor.description: Background color when toggle is OFF. Default: light '#0C000000', dark '#19FFFFFF'.

switchPointColor.description: Circular slider knob color in hex format.

allOf.description: Toggle switch component for binary on/off state. Supports label, enabled/disabled state, and custom colors for selected/unselected states.
Progress bar component for displaying task completion progress

total.description: Total progress value representing 100% completion. Required.

color.description: Progress bar foreground color in hex format. Default: light mode '#FF0A59F7', dark mode '#FF317AF7'.

type.description: Progress bar style. Default: 'linear'. 'linear': horizontal bar. 'ring': circular ring without ticks. 'eclipse': moon-phase circular. 'scaleRing': clock-tick circular. 'capsule': capsule shape (vertical when height > width).

allOf.description: Progress bar component for displaying task completion. Supports linear, ring, eclipse, scaleRing, and capsule styles.
Radio button component for single selection

value.description: Text value of the radio button. Required.

checked.description: Whether the radio button is currently checked.

group.description: Group name for mutually exclusive selection. Radio buttons with the same group name are exclusive. Default: ''.

onChange.description: Event handlers triggered when checked state changes. Event data: {isChecked: boolean}.

checkedBackgroundColor.description: Background color when checked. Default: light '#FF0A59F7', dark '#FF317AF7'.

unCheckedBorderColor.description: Border color when unchecked. Default: light '#66000000', dark '#66FFFFFF'.

indicatorColor.description: Inner circle indicator color when checked. Default: '#FFFFFFFF'.

allOf.description: Radio button component for single selection within a mutually exclusive group. Supports custom indicator and checked/unchecked colors.
Checkbox component for multiple selection

label.description: Text label displayed next to the checkbox.

value.description: Semantic identifier for the checkbox. Not rendered visually. Used as the distinguishing value within a group; accessible via getCheckboxGroupValues in interaction context.

group.description: Group name matching a CheckboxGroup component for collective control.

select.description: Whether the checkbox is initially selected.

onChange.description: Event handlers triggered when selection state changes. Event data: {value: boolean}.

selectedColor.description: Checkbox color when selected, in hex format.

unSelectedColor.description: Checkbox color when not selected, in hex format.

mark.description: Inner checkmark icon style. Object {strokeColor, size, strokeWidth}. All optional. strokeColor: hex color. size: icon size in vp (default: same as checkbox width). strokeWidth: icon line width in vp.

shape.description: Checkbox shape. Default: 'circle'. 'circle': circular shape. 'rounded_square': rounded square shape.

allOf.description: Checkbox component for multiple selection. Must be paired with a CheckboxGroup for group control. Supports custom shape (circle/rounded_square) and mark styling.
Checkbox group for controlling select all/select none state

group.description: Group name shared by all Checkbox components in this group. Default: ''.

selectAll.description: Whether to select all checkboxes in the group. Default: false.

onChange.description: Event handlers triggered when group selection changes. Event data: {value: string[], status: 'All'|'Part'|'None'}.

selectedColor.description: Color when all or partially selected, in hex format.

unSelectedColor.description: Color when none selected, in hex format.

mark.description: Inner checkmark icon style. Same structure as Checkbox.mark.

checkboxShape.description: Default shape for all unconfigured checkboxes in the group. Default: 'circle'. 'circle': circular. 'rounded_square': rounded square. Individual Checkbox.shape overrides this.

allOf.description: Checkbox group component for controlling select-all/select-none state across multiple Checkbox components sharing the same group name.

If.description: Conditional component that renders different branches based on condition. Virtual node - does not support events.

id.description: Unique component identifier within the surface

condition.description: Condition expression. When true, renders childrenIf; when false, renders childrenElse. Must be an expression wrapped in {{...}}.

childrenIf.description: Array of child component IDs to render when condition evaluates to true.

childrenElse.description: Array of child component IDs to render when condition evaluates to false.

allOf.description: Conditional rendering component. Evaluates an expression and renders childrenIf when true, childrenElse when false. Virtual node — does not support events (onClick, onAppear).

getRadioValue.description: Gets the value text of the selected Radio component in a group. Returns an empty string if the group is not found or no Radio is selected.

getCheckboxGroupValues.description: Gets value texts of all selected Checkbox components in a CheckboxGroup. Returns an empty array if the group is not found or none are selected.

getToggleValue.description: Gets the on/off state and label text of a Toggle component.

getSelectValue.description: Gets the text value of the currently selected Select option. Returns an empty string if the component is not found or no option is selected.

break.description: Breaks out of the current EventHandler chain, stopping execution of subsequent EventHandlers.

setDataModel.description: Sets a value in the data model at the specified path.

setAttributes.description: Modifies attribute values of a target component in batch.

navigate.description: Performs navigation to a NavContainer sub-page.

expressionUsageConstraints.description: Constraints and limitations for expression usage in extended components

supportedComponents.description: Only extended components (marked with *) support expressions

supportedMessages.description: Expressions only work in updateComponents messages

restrictedProperties.description: Cannot use expressions in 'component' or 'id' properties

pathRestriction.description: A2UI native data binding 'path' attribute does not support expressions (literal JSON Pointer only). However, function argument 'path' (e.g. setDataModel args.path) does support expressions.

handlerRestriction.description: EventHandler 'call' and 'as' properties cannot use expressions

valueOnly.description: Expressions can only be used in values, not in keys/property names

sizeLimit.description: Expression string total length must not exceed 2048 characters

nestingLimit.description: Parenthesis nesting depth must not exceed 20 levels

schemaAuthority.description: Whether each property supports expressions is ultimately determined by the catalog JSON Schema definition (Expression union type). If a property's schema includes Expression as an option, it supports expressions; otherwise it does not.
